_comment: Machine-readable, EXPIRING allowlist for `npm run security:audit`. Each entry suppresses a specific high/critical advisory that has no non-regressive fix yet. `npm run security:audit:raw` always shows the unfiltered truth. An expired entry FAILS the gate (forces re-evaluation). Never add an exception without an expiry and a concrete reason.

exceptions.reason: sharp is pulled in transitively by next@15.5.20; npm's only offered remediation is a DOWNGRADE to next@14.2.35 (breaking and older). No stable Next on the 15.x line yet declares sharp>=0.35. In this UAT build sharp is used only by Next's optional image optimizer at build time; BMS serves all images through the controlled /media route and never transcodes untrusted image bytes at runtime. Re-pin Next as soon as a release bumps sharp>=0.35.
exceptions.expiresNote: Earlier of 2026-08-21 or the first cloud UAT deployment — whichever comes first; revisit then.
